mnemonics: Mastering Queries Easily Daily Nurtures Beginners
Many Objects Need Great Data Navigation Basics
keyPoints: Aggregate(): aggregation of data, like sum, mean, count
Array Filters(): Filtering data in arrays
Conditional Expressions(): conditional logic in queries
Indexing(): increasing query performance with indexes
Map Reduce(): parallel processing of large data sets
Projection(): selecting specific fields in data
Regular Expressions(): pattern matching in queries
Sort(): sorting data in ascending or descending order
Stage-based Queries(): breaking down complex queries into smaller stages
Text Search(): searching data in text fields
